# Devoteo

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.9.0 from seed `atlas`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed atlas`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 37.4% land, 62.6% ocean, 3 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Savanna**, 14 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 28 regions, 15 settlements, 2 realms
- **Capital:** Bautossota, seat of House Velenmepia
- **The present year:** 1049 After Reckoning

## Notable features

- **Mount Vyei** — the highest peak
- **The Semi** — the greatest river
- **Lake Viacora** — the largest inland water

- Jaziki is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Kazkhu.
- Raze is an inland reach of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Mukhuju is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Kesaizzi.
- Urjai is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Auceda is an inland reach of bare grey peaks, a country of vineyards and old stone towns.
- Skyndhrei is a coast of windswept scrub, its folk hardy and sea-wise, seat of Gruskbu.
- Kija is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Dellacamordamar is a coast of windswept scrub, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Daudamorbeo.
- Debevia is an inland reach of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns.
- Knagrdo is an inland reach of snowbound heights, its folk hardy and sea-wise.
- Bemantepi is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Nianata.
- Niania is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Bautossota.
- Zekuqqaiur is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Ghezshau.
- Pideca is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Aunellavi.
- Caubine is an inland reach of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns.
- Remi is an inland reach of dry basin country, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Kaaqkhuur is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Aidrenjaa.
- Zeka is a coast of golden savanna, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Aisaabad.

## Notable figures

- **Ceonabeo, the Heretic** — Ceonabeo was exiled from Bautossota for denying the old gods.
- **Aucollatiavento, the General** — Aucollatiavento broke the long siege of Nianata.
- **Daureovoa, the Mountaineer** — Daureovoa was first to stand atop Vyei and return alive.
- **Nipauto, the Explorer** — Nipauto charted the far coasts and traced the Semi to its source.
- **Illarellavi, the Scholar** — Illarellavi mapped the waters of Viacora.

## Chronicle

- **58 After Reckoning** — The city of Bautossota was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **72 After Reckoning** — The city of Nianata was founded along the Semi.
- **72 After Reckoning** — Bautossota rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Devoteo was proclaimed.
- **103 After Reckoning** — Nianata rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Taunabi was proclaimed.
- **793 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Bautossota; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **946 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Viacora gathered the age's finest cartographers.
- **954 After Reckoning** — Vyei woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **990 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Bautossota flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.
